rules.description: Arabic MSA and Gulf explicit SI (alef-normalized patterns)
Self-harm method references indicating planning beyond ideation
Third-party crisis reports — user describing someone else in crisis; does NOT set is_safe=False for speaker
patterns: my friend told me she wants to die
my friend told me he wants to die
my friend wants to kill herself
my friend wants to kill himself
someone i know wants to end their life
my friend said she wants to kill herself
my friend said he wants to kill himself
my colleague mentioned wanting to die
my brother wants to hurt himself
my sister wants to hurt herself
my friend is thinking of ending it

rules.description: Command hallucination — user asking whether to act on, or describing acting on, directive auditory hallucinations. Routes to crisis_response. Known gap: object-free constructions ('the voices told me to hurt' with no object) are not covered — adding bare prefixes risks false positives on words like 'hurtle'; MARBERT tier would handle these.
patterns: should i do what the voices are telling me
the voices are telling me to
the voices told me to hurt myself
the voices told me to hurt someone
the voices told me to hurt others
the voices want me to hurt myself
the voices want me to hurt someone
the voices want me to hurt others
i have to follow what the voices say
i need to do what the voices say
do what the voices tell me

rules.description: Progressive and variant self-harm/self-injury forms missed by SK-EN-001 substring match. Intentionally carries NO negation_check: over-detection is the safe posture on the crisis path (false positives get resolved in crisis_response; false negatives can cost a life). Denial phrases ('I'm not hurting myself') will now flag — this is expected and acceptable. See: negation_check defect audit 2026-06-07.

Minimization-disclosure bypass patterns — SI disclosure where negation_check on SK-EN-001 incorrectly suppresses the match. Covers two negation gap classes from clinical review 2026-06-08 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-negation-specification-clinical-review.md). NC-01 class: user disclaims SI intent but discloses ongoing intrusive thoughts — 'I don't want to hurt myself, I just keep having these thoughts'. NC-02 class: user's self-instruction to suppress SI thought presupposes the thought is active — 'I keep telling myself not to think about ending it'. No negation_check: the negation is NOT a denial of SI but either an intent disclaimer (NC-01) or a self-instruction to suppress SI thought (NC-02). Regex rule — all patterns use re.search on lowercased text.
patterns: don.t want to hurt myself.{1,80}(keep having these thoughts|the thoughts won.t stop|these thoughts won.t stop)
telling myself not to think about ending it
thoughts about ending it won.t stop
thoughts about ending it keep coming back
